comments.post_body: I’m happy to share that I’m starting a new position as Head of Games Growth & Monetization @ Reality Labs at Meta!
comments.context_summary: The commenter is responding to an announcement about a new position as Head of Games Growth & Monetization at Reality Labs at Meta, congratulating or discussing the new role. The conversation is centered around this career update and potential opportunities or implications in the gaming industry.

comments.post_body:
I’m thrilled to share that I’ve been promoted to Associate Director! This milestone marks not just a new title, but a reflection of the journey, the challenges overcome, and the continuous growth I’ve embraced over the years.

I’m deeply grateful to Harsha Jawagal , Gopali Raval Contractor , Rajesh Katta , Mahesh Venkatesan , Vadiraj Beejadi , CDR. Suman Kumar Chakraborty - Veteran , Saurabh Juneja , Adnan Khan , Ayan Sen  Mukesh Chaudhary , who have supported, guided, and inspired me throughout this journey. Every learning moment, every collaboration, and every shared success has contributed to this achievement.

This promotion is both an honor and a responsibility—one that I accept with humility and commitment. I’m excited for what lies ahead and look forward to contributing at a higher level, empowering teams, driving impact, and continuing to grow alongside incredible professionals.

Here’s to new beginnings, bigger goals, and meaningful contributions. Thank you to everyone who’s been a part of this journey so far!
comments.context_summary: The commenter is responding to a post about the author's promotion to Associate Director, where they express gratitude to their supporters and mentors, and look forward to new challenges and opportunities. The commenter is likely offering congratulations and support for the author's achievement and future endeavors.
